common.languages.label: Language
dashboard.welcome.title: Welcome to ORION
dashboard.welcome.role: You are signed in as {{ role }}.
dashboard.welcome.tagline: ORION is a small cognitive system that distributes cognitive load between the computational agent and human judgment. Pick a pillar below to review the agent's proposals.
dashboard.pillars.title: Operational pillars
dashboard.pillars.assignments.title: Census Assignment
dashboard.pillars.assignments.descriptio: Cross available nodes with quotas and calendars to propose household assignments to vendors.
dashboard.pillars.expansion.title: Network Expansion
dashboard.pillars.expansion.description: Detect expansion opportunities by crossing households without coverage with high-demand zones.
dashboard.pillars.maintenance.title: Risk-based Maintenance
dashboard.pillars.maintenance.descriptio: Prioritize interventions on nodes with outage history and signals of systematic saturation.
dashboard.pillars.postSale.title: Post-sale Follow-up
dashboard.pillars.postSale.description: Schedule follow-up surveys applying the commercial harassment policy.
assignments.header.title: Route Assignment
assignments.header.subtitle: Pick a polygon on the map, choose a distributor and a supervisor, and confirm the assignment.
assignments.confirm.title: Confirm assignment
assignments.confirm.subtitle: Review the details before registering the assignment.
assignments.warnings.invalidGeometry: There are {{ count }} polygons with invalid geometry that cannot be assigned.
routes.header.title: My Routes
routes.header.subtitle: Pick a day to see the assigned polygon, the vendor list, and validate your location.
routes.summary.title: Day summary
routes.gps.title: My location
routes.gps.heading: Heading
routes.warnings.outsidePolygon: Location outside of the assigned polygon.
